title: campanopsis campanuloides
intro: Campanopsis campanuloides, also known as the Chinese bellflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, Campanopsis campanuloides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
